contract.name: Win the Battle
contract.description: Use a damaging move in battle to lower the opposing Pokémon’s HP and eventually knock it out. Use this on your turn whenever a fight starts or continues and you want to win the battle in Pokémon Red.

contract.name: Heal at Pokecenter
contract.description: Use a Pokémon Center to fully heal your party’s HP and cure status conditions by talking to Nurse Joy and choosing to heal. Do this after battles, before caves/routes, or anytime your team is weakened

contract.name: Take Starter Pokémon
contract.description: Choose your first Pokémon from Professor Oak’s table in Pallet Town after he stops you from leaving town. Use this at the start of Pokémon Red to receive Bulbasaur, Charmander, or Squirtle and begin t

contract.name: Finish Oak Lab Start
contract.description: Completes the final Oak’s Lab intro sequence in Pokémon Red: receive your starter, finish the first rival battle, and exit the lab. Use it right after choosing a Pokémon when the opening lab events ar

contract.name: Explore Opening Area
contract.description: Explores the opening routes and towns around Pallet Town/Viridian to reveal tiles, enter buildings, talk to NPCs, and spot items or exits. Use it early in Pokémon Red after gaining control, before com

contract.name: Start the Journey
contract.description: Starts a new Pokémon Red game by advancing through the title screen and opening intro dialogue. Use it at the very beginning, from the startup/title screen, to reach the initial in-game opening sequen

contract.name: Trigger Position Event
contract.description: Stand on the specific map tile or coordinate that triggers a hidden position-based event in Pokémon Red, such as advancing a scripted scene. Use it when you need to activate story progress or a locati

contract.name: Start with Squirtle
contract.description: In Pokémon Red’s opening at Professor Oak’s lab, choose Squirtle as your starter from the Poké Ball table. Use this at the beginning of a new game when setting up a run that starts with Squirtle.

contract.name: Preserve Squirtle Safely
contract.description: Keep Squirtle alive by switching it out before HP gets dangerously low and using safer teammates or items to finish fights. Use this whenever Squirtle is threatened by strong attacks, bad matchups, or
